title: Gelbard: Historia secreta del último burgués nacional
original_title: Gelbard: la historia secreta del último burgués nacional
overview: Documentary about José Ber Gelbard, Argentina's Minister of Economy from 1973 to 1974, during the governments of Héctor Cámpora, Juan Domingo Perón, and Isabel Perón.
